title: steer-push: a pre-life test for a steer-vs-push (selection-vs-causation) criterion
description: Toy dynamical-systems battery testing whether a criterion can separate when a physical difference STEERS a system (selection) from when it merely PUSHES it (causation), below life -- no chooser, no self-maintaining beneficiary, no observer -- against a fixed adversarial bar (FEP-flat and Deacon-PUSH). It adjudicates honestly across Step 5 (CONCEDE, renaming -- the separation reduces to bistable memory) and Step 6 (CLOSE, deflationary terminus -- below life, with no interpreter, the surplus that separates a sign from a cause-plus-memory cannot be positive without a beneficiary). Pre-registration is append-only with predicted verdicts locked before each run.
